title: Tiered Armors
description: Its a progression type datapack that makes crafting armors a bit harder
body:
This datapack is designed to change armor recipes to make progression a bit more challenging. The crafting progression from leather armor up to diamond armor has been modified.

Let’s break down how the armor progression works:



  ![lether armor -> iron armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ecf4f524117eb7a22ede521996cdd7270959911.png)


 
 ![Iron armor -> Gold armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b431d3c4b01680041f33aa50033164c6d2344cb5.png)




 
 ![Gold armor -> Diamond Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9720a2956405a47019043494b2a99e52e78d9f57.png)

Pretty basic stuff, and you're free to add this to your server or singleplayer world.
That’s all from me I hope you enjoy the datapack! 

(Note that every datapack version has been tested by me and the ones that i upload is okey if u saw an error or something please let me know so that i can fix it as quickly as possible.)
